title: Shijiazhuang, Hebei — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Shijiazhuang, Hebei: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Shijiazhuang is a city in Hebei with a population of 11,231,000. Capital of Hebei province, a transportation and industrial hub near Beijing, known for its pharmaceutical and textile industries.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
